name: test_log_creator
description: Unit tests for LogCreator (PDF log file structure). 12 tests covering file structure, directory creation, template substitution, edge cases. 100% passing

name: test_sys_file_parser
description: Unit tests for SYS file parsing (node config extraction). 20 tests covering AP (15 passing) + AL (4 failing) node types. Systematic AL off-by-one issue

name: test_token_detection
description: Token detection validation (2 tests, 100% passing). Note: returns bool instead of assert (anti-pattern)

name: test_sequential_processor_guard
description: Tests guard condition in SequentialCommandProcessor._on_command_completed(). Validates ignoring unowned commands (Print All Nodes) while processing owned commands (context menu operations)

name: Code.Config.Chatmodes.Module_DevTeam_chatmode
observations: DevTeam chatmode configuration with 11-phase workflow and VMP integration. Core principles: memory-first, codegraph-driven, structured phases, CEPH evolution, quality gates (100% test pass), vertical mode protocol for interruptions.

VMP section: Stack-based workflow management with PUSH/POP operations. Auto-detection triggers (5 patterns), max depth 5, breadcrumb navigation with ← arrows. Unified template handles user questions and agent blockers via ORIGIN field differentiation.

Modified 2025-10-13: Replaced IRP with condensed VMP (60→18 lines). Added STACK optional field to completion format. Updated Error Recovery with VMP routing (TEST failure→PUSH DEBUG, blocker→PUSH appropriate phase, max depth→POP_ALL). Updated Communication section (Horizontal/Vertical flows).

name: Code.Config.Instructions.Module_standards
observations: Project standards configuration defining memory system (4-layer), documentation templates (ARCH/BLUEPRINT/TECH/GUIDE), quality standards (code <500 lines, testing 100% pass), codegraph standards, communication standards (phase indicators, status format).

Modified 2025-10-13: Added VMP format requirements section with STACK optional field. Examples: '🔄 VMP PUSH | STACK: 🏗️ ARCHITECT ← 🔬 ANALYZE (depth:2)' for blockers, '🔄 VMP | STACK: 💻 IMPLEMENT (depth:0)' for user interruptions. Stack notation uses ← arrows for breadcrumbs.

name: generator.py
content: Report generation module with node-based grouping, PDF anchor bookmarks, DOCX TOC, intelligent line wrapping. Key methods: extract_node_from_filename(regex), group_logs_by_node(Dict structure), wrap_long_lines(textwrap), generate_pdf(reportlab with anchors), generate_docx(python-docx with headings). TYPE_ORDER constant for file type ordering. Try/except import for utils.file_utils compatibility.

name: test_report_generation_improvements.py
content: Comprehensive test suite for report generation features. 6 test classes (NodeExtraction, LogGrouping, LineWrapping, PDFGeneration, DOCXGeneration, Integration) with 24 tests total. Validates regex patterns, dictionary grouping, textwrap logic, reportlab integration, python-docx integration, end-to-end workflows. Uses tempfile for isolation, pytest fixtures for test data.
